# VedaGlows

> Modern Ayurvedic skincare made in India. A simple 28-day, 3-step ritual — Daily Clean, Glow Repair and Deep Detox — to reduce breakouts, balance oil and restore your natural glow.

VedaGlows combines traditional Ayurvedic herbs with modern formulation to create gentle, effective skincare for Indian skin. The flagship product is the 28-Day Skin Reset Kit, available as 1, 2 or 3-kit bundles. Free shipping across India, Cash on Delivery available, and a 7-day satisfaction promise.

## Pages

- [Home](/): The 28-Day Skin Reset Kit, ingredients, real customer results and pricing.
- [About](/about): Brand story, mission and the herbal-first approach.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Common questions on products, ingredients, shipping and returns.
- [Customer Support](/support): Email, phone, WhatsApp and Instagram contact details.
- [Refund Policy](/refund): 7-day satisfaction promise and return terms.
